title: Lag Generator
description: Server utility to generate lag for low-TPS testing.
body:
Lag Generator allows you to generate two types of lag: server tick lag (either or both of the pre- and post- tick), and entity tick lag.

It is controlled via game rules as outlined in the [readme](https://github.com/noobanidus/LagGenerator/blob/mdg-1.21/README.md).

**Patreon & Discord**

You can support me [on Patreon](https://patreon.com/noobanidus)!

All support for this mod is available on [my Discord](https://noobanidus.com/discord). You can also keep up with what I'm doing and get notifications streams! For all other support, please click on "Issues" at the top of this page.
